description: Create coverage-gate.ts, mutation-gate.ts, Stryker config, and package.json for the testing package with quality gate enforcement logic
steps: Create packages/testing/package.json with name @quant/testing, scripts (typecheck, test), devDependencies (vitest ^2, typescript ~5.5.0), and dependencies (zod ^3.24.2 for config validation). Include type:module.
Create packages/testing/tsconfig.json following the same pattern as packages/auth/tsconfig.json (strict, ESNext module, composite:true)
Create packages/testing/vitest.config.ts following the same pattern as packages/auth/vitest.config.ts

Create packages/testing/src/coverage-gate.ts - A CoverageGate class that: (1) defines critical packages list (auth, payments, security), (2) reads vitest coverage JSON output, (3) computes per-package line coverage, (4) enforces 80% line threshold on critical packages, (5) exports a runCoverageGate() function that returns pass/fail with detailed report. Use the existing CoverageThresholds type from ./types.

Create packages/testing/src/mutation-gate.ts - A MutationGate class that: (1) generates a Stryker mutation testing configuration targeting packages/auth/src, packages/payments/src, packages/security/src, (2) defines 60% mutation score threshold, (3) exports generateStrykerConfig() returning valid StrykerOptions object, (4) exports runMutationGate() that validates config and checks results against threshold.

Create stryker.conf.mjs at project root - Valid Stryker configuration for the monorepo: mutate patterns targeting auth/payments/security src files, vitest as test runner, incremental mode enabled, thresholds (high:80, low:60, break:60), JSON+HTML reporters.

Add types to packages/testing/src/types.ts for CoverageGateConfig, CoverageGateResult, MutationGateConfig, MutationGateResult. These should include packageName, threshold, actual coverage percentage, pass boolean.
Update packages/testing/src/index.ts to export the new CoverageGate and MutationGate classes.

Create packages/testing/src/__tests__/coverage-gate.test.ts - Tests that: (1) CoverageGate correctly identifies packages below 80% threshold, (2) CoverageGate passes when all critical packages meet threshold, (3) report includes per-package breakdown.

Create packages/testing/src/__tests__/mutation-gate.test.ts - Tests that: (1) generateStrykerConfig() produces valid config with correct mutate patterns, (2) MutationGate correctly validates against 60% threshold, (3) config targets only auth/payments/security packages.
acceptance_criteria: stryker.conf.mjs exists at root with valid Stryker configuration targeting auth/payments/security
Coverage gate enforces 80% line coverage on critical packages
Mutation gate enforces 60% mutation score threshold
Unit tests pass for both gates: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run packages/testing/src/__tests__/
